items.title: X ships an official hosted MCP server
items.why: Your agent can now query X's API (200+ endpoints) with your own account, via a hosted remote server at api.x.com/mcp — nothing new executes locally, auth is OAuth on first use.

items.title: X API is pay-per-use for new developers
items.why: The Basic/Pro tiers are legacy-only since February: new signups pay $0.005/post read (2M/mo cap), $0.015/write, $0.20 for posts with links. A 150-account watchlist now costs hundreds, not $5k.

items.title: xAI retired legacy Grok model slugs — requests now route to grok-4.3
items.why: grok-4, grok-4.1-fast and grok-code-fast-1 redirect to grok-4.3 ($1.25/$2.50 per M tokens) since May 15. If any config pins those slugs, you're already on a different model than you think.

items.title: Editor's note: CLAUDE.md is a context budget, not a wiki
items.why: Every line ships with every session and competes with your actual work for context. Keep it under ~60 lines of per-session instructions; move reference material to docs/ and link it.

items.title: Sizing note: pay-per-use X reads cap at 2M posts/month
items.why: If you're building an X ingestion pipeline, the cap is the ceiling that matters: 2M reads/mo ≈ 66k posts/day. Above that you're in Enterprise territory (~$42k/mo).

actions.title: Add X's official hosted MCP server to this project

vetting.note: Announced 2026-06-30. Remote server hosted by X: no code is installed or executed on your machine. It acts with YOUR account's permissions after OAuth — treat write scopes accordingly.

actions.title: CLAUDE.md context-budget audit prompt
actions.snippet: Audit my CLAUDE.md against a 60-line context budget: (1) flag lines that are reference material rather than per-session behavioral instructions; (2) propose the <60-line version; (3) move the rest into docs/ files with one-line links from CLAUDE.md. Show me the before/after diff — don't write anything until I approve.
actions.dest_hint: paste into a Claude Code session in any repo that has a CLAUDE.md
